name: TN Brain · 11 · HubSpot push (approved opportunities → deals)

parameters.query: UPDATE hubspot_pushes hp SET status='pushing' WHERE hp.id IN (SELECT id FROM hubspot_pushes WHERE status='pending' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 10) RETURNING hp.id, hp.signal_id, hp.deal_name, hp.account_id, (SELECT s.details->>'networks_total' FROM signals s WHERE s.id=hp.signal_id) AS networks_total, COALESCE((SELECT d.hubspot_company_id FROM deals d WHERE d.account_id=hp.account_id AND d.hubspot_company_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),(SELECT st.hubspot_company_id FROM stakeholders st WHERE st.account_id=hp.account_id AND st.hubspot_company_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1)) AS company_id;

parameters.content:
## Approved opportunity → HubSpot deal
Every 15 min: claim queue rows the dashboard approved (a human clicked Yes) → create the deal in the 'Opportunity Qualification' pipeline, stage 'Existing', mapped to the account's company, carrying the NETWORKS score → mark pushed (or failed with the error).

REQUIRES: the HubSpot private-app token needs crm.objects.deals.write (ask IT). Nothing is ever pushed without the on-dashboard approval. Run db/2026-07_hubspot_push.sql before first run.
